rationale: In the citing paper, Peng et al. (2018) appears only in a grouped citation used to support a broad background claim that firms use social media as a marketing tool. The paper does not discuss this cited study's network-overlap theory, hazard-model approach, or findings in its conceptual development, model construction, or empirical interpretation. Because the citation serves as general context rather than a distinct functional input, its role is best classified as a passing mention.
